block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: The analysts maintained an Underperform on Intel Corp and a $30 price target. Two separate media reports suggested the company’s plan to reduce its marketing and sales headcount by 20% and create greater decision-making separation between its design and manufacturing teams.
block_07: Cannabis stocks have seen challenging days without any progress on federal reforms since 2021. Cannabis firm shares plummeted the last week after the Q1 Fiscal Report 2023. But despite this, the share rose by 20% this week.
block_10: Despite the improvements, shareholders face massive dilution over the long term. A month earlier, the management inked an agreement to sell an additional 425 million of the new shares – the share fell by 16% this week.
